description: Same-APK Android questionnaire panel activity for low-rate session evidence capture.

device: adb shell am start -n <package>/.QuestionnairePanelActivity -a io.github.mesmerprism.rustyquest.native_renderer.action.OPEN_QUESTIONNAIRE_BLOCK --ei block 1 --es session_id <session>
adb shell am start -n <package>/.QuestionnairePanelActivity -a io.github.mesmerprism.rustyquest.native_renderer.action.APPLY_QUESTIONNAIRE_COMMAND --es command defaults --es session_id <session>

public_private_boundary: The Android panel shell, command surface, and app-private JSONL append bridge are public substrate. Questionnaire content, study labels, and private validation assets must be staged by the owning app repo.
